notes: Germany are without CB Nico Schlotterbeck (knee ligament injury, tournament over) and LB Nathaniel Brown is a late fitness doubt (adductor) though Nagelsmann expects him to play; Paraguay are missing suspended MF Diego Gómez and CB Omar Alderete is doubtful (knee), while Almiron returns after serving his one-match ban for the red card vs Turkey.
home_scorers: Kai Havertz (starting striker, focal point of attack)
Jamal Musiala (creative No.10, high goal involvement)
away_scorers: Antonio Sanabria (lone striker, Paraguay's primary finisher)
Julio Enciso (dynamic forward, direct goal threat)
Miguel Almiron (returning attacker, energetic runner into box)
